## Problem

<!-- What use case or pain point does this solve? Who hits it and how often? -->

## Proposal

<!-- What would the feature do? Sketch the behavior, not the implementation. -->

## Alternatives

<!-- What else did you consider, and why is the proposal better? -->

## Impact

- Affected sections: <!-- Atlas / ECG / Casos / Info / Admin / All -->
- Affected roles: <!-- guest / user / admin -->
- Risk of regression: <!-- low / medium / high -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue explicitly does **not** cover. -->
